content_of_post_to_comment:
I think I am addicted to content, it is like I can't have more than 10s of silence. I keep checking my phone and it's like I need a YouTube video going in the background all the time.

I tell myself that it's ok cause I am working a lot and I am, but that's also because I am not so efficient and end up putting in more hours. Or that it's not so bad cause it is education content and I have found very interesting and exciting stuff but I also can't really go further with it, as soon as a video ends I'm already seeing a new one on a completely different topic.

I feel like it's really affecting my mood, attention span and making me numb and compliant.

I tried deactivating the history data on YouTube and it helped ... For a little while. Has anyone dealt with this successfully?
